channel.title: XKey Updates
channel.description: XKey - Vietnamese Input Method for macOS

item.title: Version 1.2.21 (Build 20260326)
item.description:
What's New

fix(opera): add address bar detection for Opera browser

  • Add Opera AX patterns to isChromiumAddressBar():

AXDescription 'Address field', AXDOMClassList 'AddressTextfieldView'

  • Add isOperaSpeedDialAddressBar() for Speed Dial page where AX

returns no focused element (role=nil), using direct window title query

  • Update app icon assets
  • Bump build number to 20260326

Xem chi tiết trên GitHub
